inclusion_criteria: Original human comparative studies (RCTs, nonrandomized trials, or cohort studies) that include both obese adults with T2DM and obese adults without T2DM.
Population: adults (≥18 years) with obesity; baseline BMI within 35.5–42.6 kg/m² or subgroup data available within this range; T2DM status clearly defined.
Intervention/comparator: total diet replacement using liquid-formula diets that are VLCD (<800 kcal/day) or low-energy (>800 kcal/day), delivered equivalently to both T2DM and non‑T2DM groups.
Outcomes: quantitative body weight change reported to extract final weight loss in kg and/or rate of weight loss (kg/week).
exclusion_criteria: No direct comparison between T2DM and non‑T2DM groups receiving the same formula TDR (e.g., single‑arm studies, different interventions across groups).

Interventions not total diet replacement liquid‑formula diets or combined with major co‑interventions that confound effects (e.g., bariatric surgery, initiation/change of anti‑obesity or antidiabetic drugs, or substantial exercise programs); partial meal‑replacement only.
Population outside scope: pediatric samples, BMI outside 35.5–42.6 kg/m² without separable subgroup in range, non‑T2DM diabetes types (type 1/gestational) or mixed diabetes not separable.
Study type/outcomes: non‑original reports (reviews, protocols, editorials, conference abstracts, case reports) or missing quantitative body weight outcomes needed for final kg loss or kg/week.
screening_criteria.description: Criteria to select comparative studies of obese adults with versus without T2DM undergoing total diet replacement formula diets (VLCD/LELD), reporting weight loss outcomes.
